---
title: "Loan Default Risk Analysis"
output: html_document
date: "2026-06-05"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


# Load Library
```{r load-library}
# Load required libraries
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)
library(tibble)
library(tidyr)
library(gridExtra)
library(patchwork)
library(caret)
library(tidyverse)
```

# Data Prep

## Load Data
```{r load-data}

# load data
df <- read.csv("/home/asorn/Nextcloud/Data Science/Projects/loan-default-risk/data/raw/sample_2007_to_2018Q4.csv")

# standardize names
names(df) <- make.names(names(df))
```


# EDA 

```{r initial-eda-summary}
# get descriptive stats
summary(df)
```
